name: PER_VISAS_PERMITS_F
description: This table supports storage of visa, work permit and residency data

columns.Name: VISA_PERMIT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated part of primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies which person this row records data for

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: The legislation code of the visa or permit. It must be the same value as the ISSUING_COUNTRY value.

columns.Name: VISA_PERMIT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Visa or permit number

columns.Name: VISA_PERMIT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Visa or permit type

columns.Name: VISA_PERMIT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of visa or permit

columns.Name: VISA_PERMIT_STATUS_DATE
columns.Comments: Date the status came into effect

columns.Name: VISA_PERMIT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Category of visa or permit

columns.Name: ISSUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of issue of visa or permit

columns.Name: EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Expiration date of visa or permit

columns.Name: ENTRY_DATE
columns.Comments: Entry date of person to the country

columns.Name: CURRENT_VISA_PERMIT
columns.Comments: This is an obsoleted column.

columns.Name: ISSUING_AUTHORITY
columns.Comments: Issuing authority

columns.Name: ISSUING_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Country of issue

columns.Name: ISSUING_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Place of issue

columns.Name: PROFESSION
columns.Comments: Profession of holder

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.
